ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the instrument */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the instrument */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model of the instrument */,
  "colour_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the colour of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the instrument */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the image of the instrument */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the instrument */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the instrument (new, used, refurbished) */,
  "year_manufactured" INTEGER /* Year the instrument was manufactured */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was added to the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_colour_id FOREIGN KEY ("colour_id") REFERENCES colours ("colour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colours" (
  "colour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each colour */,
  "colour_name" TEXT /* Name of the colour */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the colour */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hex code of the colour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("colour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the image file */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (customer, sales staff, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (pending, processing, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (credit card, PayPal, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping arrangement */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the shipping arrangement belongs to */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address the order was shipped to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_levels" (
  "stock_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock level */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the stock level belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the instrument in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level (minimum quantity to trigger reordering) */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity (quantity to order when reordering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_levels_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the condition belongs to */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_conditions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warranty" (
  "warranty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warranty */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the warranty belongs to */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Length of the warranty period in months */,
  "coverage" TEXT /* Description of what is covered under the warranty */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the warranty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warranty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warranty_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the review belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_features_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)
